rows.notes: The raw visual reading is '£3 21s 2½d'. As shillings (21) violate the hard rule (must be < 20), this converts to £1 1s. Thus the final amount is £4 1s 2½d. Gemini-flash correctly identified the original 21s and applied this conversion, and correctly identified 2½d. Gpt-5-mini significantly misread the amounts. The description 'Wm Bettell' (gpt-5-mini) is visually more accurate than 'Wine Battels'.
